name: Lunit
description: Lunits medical imaging AI APIs — Lunit INSIGHT CXR and MMG for radiology and Lunit SCOPE for oncology research integrations.

seo.title: Lunit — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Lunit: Lunits medical imaging AI APIs — Lunit INSIGHT CXR and MMG for radiology and Lunit SCOPE for oncology research integrations.

when_to_use: Analyzing medical imaging for cancer detection via AI API
Integrating AI radiology scoring into PACS/diagnostic workflows
Running AI-assisted chest X-ray and mammography screening
Building diagnostic AI features backed by FDA/CE-cleared models

pros: Clinically validated radiology and oncology AI
cons: API access limited to clinical partners
Narrow scope outside imaging use cases
review.verdict: A serious medical AI partner if you're building regulated healthcare imaging workflows.
review.best_for: Hospitals, PACS vendors and research groups integrating clinical imaging AI
review.not_for: General developers or non-medical computer vision projects

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
